files.patch:
@@ -16,1 +16,1 @@
-      uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      uses: actions/checkout@v6
@@ -20,2 +20,2 @@
-    - name: 'Set up Java Development Kit'
-      uses: oracle-actions/setup-java@v1
+    - name: 'Set up Java Development Kits'
+      uses: actions/setup-java@v5
@@ -23,2 +23,4 @@
-        website: oracle.com
-        release: 21
+        distribution: 'oracle'
+        java-version: |
+          25
+          21
@@ -45,0 +47,2 @@
+        JDK25HOME: ${{ env.JAVA_HOME_25_X64 }}
+        JDK21HOME: ${{ env.JAVA_HOME_21_X64 }}
@@ -52,1 +56,1 @@
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

@@ -114,1 +114,7 @@
-by the following variables: `JDK8HOME`, `JDK9HOME`, `JDK14HOME`, `JDK18HOME`.
+by the following variables:
+- `JDK8HOME`
+- `JDK9HOME`
+- `JDK14HOME`
+- `JDK18HOME`
+- `JDK21HOME`
+- `JDK25HOME`

@@ -63,0 +63,6 @@
+ifndef JDK21HOME
+	@echo "Warning: JDK21HOME not set; some tests may not have been executed"
+endif
+ifndef JDK25HOME
+	@echo "Warning: JDK25HOME not set; some tests may not have been executed"
+endif
@@ -112,0 +118,6 @@
+endif
+ifdef JDK21HOME
+	@echo "JDK21HOME           = $(JDK21HOME)"
+endif
+ifdef JDK25HOME
+	@echo "JDK25HOME           = $(JDK25HOME)"
